no: Kivan is a CG Male Elf Ranger (Archer) and Deheriana is a ‘secret’ NPC, a NG Female Elf Fighter/Mage/Cleric (default) OR Mage (Diviner) OR Mage (Enchanter) OR Mage (Wild Mage).

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Choose one Kivan in BG2. Standalone Kivan of Shilmista is more feature-rich. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Kivan if standalone detected.
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME p#kivan.cre, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Both provide an alternative Kivan portrait. Cosmetic 'last installed wins' — no crashes or script breaks.
conflicts.source: Portrait BMP overwrite only, no gameplay impact. Neither component selected

conflicts.reason: Both add Kivan to BG2 via pdialog.2da/interdia.2da APPEND. Cannot have two Kivan entries. Choose one: Continuous NPCs (lightweight continuation) or Kivan of Shilmista (full NPC with romance/quests)
conflicts.theirComps: #701 Add Kivan Archer / #702 Add Kivan No Kit

sum: Continues Kivan's story into BG2/ToB as a joinable NPC with ranger-themed quests, revenge storyline, and romance option.
